properties.entry: SELECT f.facility_id, f.facility_name, f.description, fi.image_path FROM hotel_facility f JOIN facility_image fi ON f.facility_id = fi.facility_id WHERE fi.is_main='Y' ORDER BY f.facility_id
SELECT * FROM facility_image WHERE facility_id=? ORDER BY display_order

SELECT f.facility_id, f.facility_name, f.description, f.location, f.open_time, fi.image_path FROM hotel_facility f LEFT JOIN facility_image fi ON f.facility_id = fi.facility_id AND fi.is_main = 'Y' ORDER BY f.facility_id

SELECT rm.room_id, rm.room_name, rm.capacity, rm.room_location, rm.room_description, rm.usage_time, rm.amenity, rm.minibar, ri.image_path FROM room_manage rm JOIN room_image ri ON rm.room_id = ri.room_id WHERE ri.is_main='Y' ORDER BY rm.room_id

SELECT rm.room_id, rm.room_name, rm.capacity, rm.room_location, rm.room_description, rm.usage_time, rm.amenity, rm.minibar, ri.image_path FROM room_manage rm LEFT JOIN room_image ri ON rm.room_id = ri.room_id AND ri.is_main = 'Y' ORDER BY rm.room_id
SELECT * FROM room_image WHERE room_id=? ORDER BY display_order

SELECT r.room_id, r.room_name, r.base_capacity, r.max_capacity, r.base_price, r.extra_charge, ri.image_path FROM room r LEFT JOIN room_image ri ON r.room_id = ri.room_id AND ri.is_main = 'Y' ORDER BY r.room_id
